title: BETWEEN issue in view
poc: CREATE VIEW v2(c0, c1) AS SELECT 'B' COLLATE NOCASE, 'a' FROM t0 ORDER BY t0.c0;
SELECT SUM(count) FROM (SELECT v2.c1 BETWEEN v2.c0 AND v2.c1 as count FROM v2);
SELECT v2.c1 BETWEEN v2.c0 AND v2.c1 as count FROM v2;
key_bug_features: SUM() miscalculates with BETWEEN condition in view
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INTEGER, c1 TEXT, c2 REAL);
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1, c2) VALUES(1, 'A', 1.5);
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1, c2) VALUES(2, 'B', NULL);
CREATE VIEW v3 AS SELECT c1, c2 FROM t1 WHERE c0 BETWEEN 1 AND 2;
SELECT SUM(c2 IS NOT NULL) FROM v3 WHERE c1 BETWEEN 'A' AND 'B';
